description: Simulator-generated pre-accident trajectory initialised from INSAG-7 documented state at 01:19:00 on 26 April 1986. Generated using rbmk_sim xenon_pit scenario. Sequence stops at t=270s (01:23:30), one second before AZ-5 scram. AZ-5 positive-scram and graphite-tip effect are out of scope.
stop_reason: Hard stop at t=270s (01:23:30) — one second before AZ-5 scram
scope_exclusions: AZ-5 scram command and subsequent power excursion

sources.source: INSAG-7: The Chernobyl Accident — IAEA Safety Series No.75
sources.use: Initial conditions: power ~7% nominal, xenon poisoning, ORM ~8 rods
PDF cross-check anchor points for curves A (neutron power) and B (reactivity sum) at 5 timestamps
sources.note: Figure is a model reconstruction, not primary instrument data

claims_excluded: No prevention or counterfactual safety claim is made.
This sequence is used qualitatively to illustrate model behaviour only.

cross_check_summary.note: PDF anchor values read visually from Chernobyl_dynamics_final.pdf curves A (neutron power) and B (reactivity sum). Figure is a model reconstruction, not primary instrument data.
